name: Taichi Yaegashi
description:
Though Taichi doesn't speak much, he's very sympathetic towards others and wants to help his friends when they're having trouble. He suddenly becomes passionate when he starts talking about his hobby, pro-wrestling, and Inaba stops him when he tries to add wrestling topics to their Cultural Research Club's newspaper. He has a little sister in elementary school, Rina.  (Source: ANN)

He is often described by Inaba as being a martyr who wishes to help people at his own sacrifice.
